title: ALLOCATOR-NOVA-A Parameter Changes
post1Raw:
On behalf of @atlas-axis as Core GovOps, we request the Core Facilitator to include the following parameter changes for the ALLOCATOR-NOVA-A Prime Allocator Vault in the next available Executive Vote. See [Update Process](https://sky-atlas.io/#A.3.7.1.2.2).

1. DC-IAM: Remove `ALLOCATOR-NOVA-A` from the DC-IAM
2. `line`: Set to `0`
